query: SELECT season, viewName, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids FROM espn_season_cache WHERE season IN (2025, 2026) GROUP BY season, viewName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user yMVuFXFfyKno5zd.8bace71a6706 --database D7EDTbt5uXwnUBkJHewERh --execute SELECT season, viewName, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(id ORDER BY id) as ids FROM espn_season_cache WHERE season IN (2025, 2026) GROUP BY season, viewName;
